# poweradmin_zone_template (Data Source)

Retrieves information about a Poweradmin zone template, including its records. Look up by `id` or `name`. Requires Poweradmin 4.2.0+.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Look up a zone template by name
data "poweradmin_zone_template" "default" {
  name = "default-hosting"
}

# Look up a zone template by ID
data "poweradmin_zone_template" "by_id" {
  id = 1
}

# Inspect the records the template will apply
output "default_template_records" {
  value = data.poweradmin_zone_template.default.records
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `id` (Number) Zone template ID. Either `id` or `name` must be specified.
- `name` (String) Zone template name. Either `id` or `name` must be specified.

### Read-Only

- `description` (String) Description of the zone template
- `is_global` (Boolean) Whether the template is global
- `owner` (Number) User ID that owns the template. `0` for global templates.
- `records` (Attributes List) Records defined in the template (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--records))
- `zones_linked` (Number) Number of zones linked to this template

<a id="nestedatt--records"></a>
### Nested Schema for `records`

Read-Only:

- `content` (String) Record content
- `id` (Number) Record ID
- `name` (String) Record name (may contain `[ZONE]` placeholder)
- `priority` (Number) Record priority (used by MX, SRV)
- `ttl` (Number) Record TTL in seconds
- `type` (String) Record type
